statement: In every magma, Equation 2005 (`x = (y * (z * z)) * (w * y)`) implies Equation 1886 (`x = (y * (x * x)) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0754
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z z)) (op w y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x x)) (op x z))
